analysis.consistency: High. The components (V), casting time (1 action), and level (8) are standard for a powerful transmutation spell affecting social interaction.
analysis.quality: High. The spell offers a powerful, reliable boost to Charisma checks and makes the caster magically immune to truth-detection magic, fitting a high-level enchantment/social utility theme.

mechanics.core_effect: Guaranteed minimum Charisma check result of 15.
mechanics.secondary_effect: Immunity to magic that determines truthfulness (e.g., zone of truth, detect thoughts checks on veracity).
mechanics.interaction_notes: The primary mechanic bypasses standard advantage/disadvantage mechanics by fixing the die roll result directly, making it superior to simple bonuses for low rolls. The duration (1 hour) is appropriate for a 8th-level concentration-free buff.

analysis.suggested_edits: None. The data is complete and consistent with established D&D 5e mechanics for high-level spells.
